summary: Andreessen Horowitz and Thrive Capital are poised for a multibillion-dollar windfall from their early investments in Cursor if Elon Musk’s SpaceX moves forward with an agreement to acquire the artificial intelligence coding startup for $60 billion. Andreessen Horowitz is the largest outside shareholder in the startup, with a roughly 10% stake that would be worth about $6 billion at the estimated transaction price, according people familiar with the matter. The venture firm backed Cursor multiple

title: Asia Centric: Singapore Bets Big on AI, Equity Market Reforms
title_cn: 以亚洲为中心：新加坡大力投资人工智能和股票市场改革
summary: Singapore’s stability and business-friendly environment have long made it the regional hub of choice for tech giants such as Amazon, Google and ByteDance. However, the city-state’s traditional role as a bridge between East and West is under pressure. Rising protectionism, technological decoupling and a global retreat from free trade now threaten the open flows of capital that built its wealth.

title: Fair Isaac Slumps as Pulte Moves to Cut Credit Score Costs
title_cn: 随着普尔特采取行动削减信用评分成本，费尔艾萨克股价暴跌
summary: Shares of Fair Isaac Corp., known as FICO, sank on Wednesday, after the US government took steps that officials said were aimed at cutting costs for credit scores and making homeownership accessible to a wider swath of buyers.

title: Suburban Propane CEO: Producing Record Levels Domestically
title_cn: 郊区丙烷首席执行官：国内丙烷产量创历史新高
summary: Suburban Propane President and CEO Michael Stivala joins Bloomberg Businessweek Daily to discuss the company's current supply and demand outlook as the Iran war weighs on commodities and consumer costs across the board. Stivala says the company's robust domestic supply is keeping inventory levels elevated at a record high.  He speaks with Carol Massar and Tim Stenovec. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Asian Equities to Rise After US Stocks Hit Record: Markets Wrap
title_cn: 美股创历史新高后亚洲股市上涨：市场总结
summary: Shares in Asia were primed for advances Thursday after robust US corporate results and an extension to the US-Iran ceasefire lifted Wall Street to a record.

title: Investors Adjust to New US-Iran Normal: No Peace, No War
title_cn: 投资者适应美伊新常态：没有和平，没有战争
summary: In another reversal, US President Donald Trump announced a unilateral, open-ended extension of the ceasefire in the Iran war. Now, there’s no peace, but no active war either. This may become the new normal: a fragile ceasefire without a formal deal, with tensions simmering, sporadic flare-ups, and oil near $100. A geo-economics analysis by Bloomberg Economics highlights that the war may be settling into a prolonged middle ground: on the one hand, no formal end to the hostilities between the US/Israel and Iran because the underlying differences remain unresolved, and on the other hand, a costly escalation that draws the US deeper into a conflict it doesn't want. Ray Takeyh, Council on Foreign Relations Hasib J. Sabbagh Senior Fellow for Middle East Studies, joins Bloomberg Businessweek Daily to discuss. He speaks with Carol Massar and Tim Stenovec. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Oil Holds Gains as Peace Negotiations Between US and Iran Stall
title_cn: 由于美国和伊朗之间的和平谈判陷入僵局，石油保持上涨
summary: Oil held a three-day gain as the US and Iran remained locked in a battle for control of the Strait of Hormuz after failing to meet for a fresh round of peace talks.

title: Hassett Says He Supports Fed Chair Powell Staying On ‘Pro Tempore’
title_cn: 哈塞特表示支持美联储主席鲍威尔继续“临时”职务
summary: White House National Economic Council Director Kevin Hassett says he supports Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell’s plan to stay on at the central bank’s helm on a temporary basis if a successor hasn’t been confirmed by the Senate when his term expires next month. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Rogers Hits Estimates, Boosts Cash Outlook on Spending Cut
title_cn: 罗杰斯达到预期，因削减支出而提振现金前景
summary: Rogers Communications Inc. matched analysts’ earnings estimates and raised its 2026 outlook for free cash flow as it cuts capital spending. The shares jumped the most in six years.

title: S&P 500 Climbs to All-Time Highs; Tesla Jumps Late: Markets Wrap
title_cn: 标准普尔 500 指数攀升至历史新高；特斯拉迟到：市场结束
summary: Stocks climbed to all-time highs as a slew of strong corporate results and President Donald Trump’s extension of a ceasefire with Iran revived risk appetites after a two-day retreat. Bitcoin rallied.

title: KKR Invests $1.5 Billion in Tower Operator Vertical Bridge
title_cn: KKR 投资 15 亿美元建设塔式运营商垂直桥
summary: KKR & Co. is investing $1.5 billion in Vertical Bridge REIT LLC in a deal that people familiar with the matter said values the tower operator at $10 billion to $15 billion.

title: Tilray CEO on Possible US Cannabis Reclassification
title_cn: Tilray 首席执行官谈美国大麻可能重新分类
summary: Tilray CEO Irwin Simon discusses the expected easing of cannabis restrictions in the US, and why despite not currently selling cannabis in the United States the opportunity to do so would be 'tremendous.' He talks with Romaine Bostick and Katie Greifeld on "the Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Activists Want to Avoid 'Expensive' Proxy Fights: Mehrotra

Avinash Mehrotra, co-head of Americas M&A and global head of activism & takeover defense at Goldman Sachs, discusses the current landscape of activist landscape investing with Dani Burger on "Bloomberg Deals."
 (Source: Bloomberg)

title: BofA's Theisen: Markets Adapting Well to Volatility
title_cn: 美银泰森：市场能够很好地适应波动性
summary: Bank of America Global Head of FICC E-Trading and Markets Strategic Investments Sonali Theisen discusses the key factors currently driving market activity and how ETFs have 'created a language' in fixed income. She talks with Katie Greifeld and Romaine Bostick on "The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Gold Recovers After Two-Day Drop as Trump Extends Iran Ceasefire
title_cn: 随着特朗普延长伊朗停火期限，金价在连续两天下跌后反弹
summary: Gold regained some ground after a two-day decline, as US President Donald Trump extended a ceasefire with Iran and allowed more time to arrange fresh peace talks.

title: Emerging FX Sinks as Iran War Drags On, Oil Holds Over $100
title_cn: 伊朗战争拖延，新兴市场货币下跌，油价守住100美元以上

title: Tesla’s Earnings Beat Expectations Amid Focus on Robotics, Driverless Cars
title_cn: 由于专注于机器人和无人驾驶汽车，特斯拉的盈利超出预期
summary:
Bloomberg's Steve Man breaks down Tesla earnings that beat expectations, sending the EV maker's stock up in the aftermarket. Tesla earnings. 
The positive report comes as Tesla has been trying to ramp up sluggish sales in the US and Europe and as well as new production, turning its focus to robotics and self driving cars. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Tesla 1Q Earnings Beat Estimates Sending Share Higher
title_cn: 特斯拉第一季度盈利超出预期，股价上涨
summary: Ed Ludlow gives us a first read on Tesla's first-quarter earning which beat Wall Street estimates. Adjusted earnings per share were 41 cents beating the estimate of 34 cents. Share rose sharply after regular trading in New York. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: See Opportunity in Dislocations: Diameter Lewinsohn
title_cn: 看到位错中的机会：直径 Lewinsohn
summary: Jonathan Lewinsohn, managing partner and co-founder of Diameter Capital, joins Dani Burger on "Bloomberg Deals." Diameter Capital sees a “reckoning threatening” private credit amid the recent investor exodus spurred by a software selloff, according to Jonathan Lewinsohn, managing partner and co-founder of Diameter Capital Partners.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Chip Stocks Rally for Record 16th Straight Day on AI Optimism
title_cn: 人工智能乐观情绪推动芯片股连续第 16 天创纪录上涨
summary: An index tracking semiconductor stocks posted its all-time longest streak of daily gains, as investors anticipate strong growth for the sector driven by demand related to artificial intelligence.

title: Getty Images Downgraded on Weaker Liquidity, Merger Doubt
title_cn: 盖蒂图片社因流动性疲弱和合并疑虑而被下调评级
summary: Moody’s Ratings cut Getty Images Inc.’s credit rating deeper into junk territory, citing weakening liquidity, with lingering uncertainty over a potential merger with Shutterstock Inc. adding to the pressure.

title: Citadel’s Yearslong Spirit Bet Faces New Risk on US Rescue Plan
title_cn: Citadel 多年的烈酒赌注面临美国救援计划的新风险
summary: Ken Griffin’s Citadel has been intertwined in Spirit Aviation Holdings Inc.’s bankruptcies over the past two years. It even parted ways earlier this year with a portfolio manager after a series of losses that included a soured bet on the distressed budget carrier.

title: US Stocks Set Fresh Record High as Trump Extends Iran Ceasefire
title_cn: 特朗普延长伊朗停火协议，美股创历史新高
summary: US stocks closed at a fresh record high on Wednesday as President Donald Trump’s ceasefire extension with Iran boosted optimism among traders.

title: Blackstone Private Credit Fund Draws Strong Demand for Bond Sale
title_cn: 黑石私人信贷基金吸引了债券销售的强劲需求
summary: Blackstone Inc. offered further evidence that concerns about private credit cracks are easing after an $850 million bond sale for one of its funds attracted about $4.3 billion of demand.

title: Convenience Store Chain Yesway Climbs After $280 Million IPO
title_cn: 连锁便利店 Yesway 首次公开募股 2.8 亿美元后股价攀升
summary: Yesway Inc. shares rose 6.2% in the company’s trading debut, after the convenience store operator raised $280 million in an upsized initial public offering.

title: National Healthcare REIT Closes Flat After $462 Million IPO
title_cn: 国家医疗保健 REIT 首次公开募股 4.62 亿美元后收盘持平
summary: National Healthcare Properties Inc. shares closed unchanged after the real estate investment trust raised $462 million in an initial public offering priced below the marketed range.

title: Head of Bolivian State Oil Company Quits After Less Than a Month
title_cn: 玻利维亚国家石油公司负责人不到一个月就辞职
summary: The head of Bolivia’s state-run oil company stepped down just three weeks into the job, as the country struggles with an energy crisis that’s left long lines at gas stations in major cities.

title: Oil Rises on Elusive Peace Deal Outlook, Iran Gunboat Attacks
title_cn: 和平协议前景难以捉摸、伊朗炮艇袭击导致油价上涨
summary: Oil rose as peace negotiations between the US and Iran stalled, with both sides using blockades of the vital Strait of Hormuz to try and gain leverage in a seven-week war that has upended global energy markets.

title: Jay Leno Hypes Up Burbank Airport Bond Sale to Muni Investors
title_cn: 杰·莱诺 (Jay Leno) 大力宣传伯班克机场向市政投资者出售债券

title: Trump’s Shopping Spree for Equity Stakes Nears $21B
title_cn: 特朗普的股权收购热潮接近 $21B
summary: Bloomberg's Scarlet Fu joins Dani Burger on "Bloomberg Deals." The Trump administration’s $20.9 billion buying spree for equity stakes in private-sector companies is the biggest such push into strategic industries since the Second World War, according to research by the Council on Foreign Relations. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump Media CEO Exit Caps a 90% Drop as MAGA Stocks Stumble
title_cn: MAGA 股票暴跌，特朗普媒体 CEO 退出导致股价跌幅达 90%
summary: Truth Social has rarely been more important on Wall Street, where traders hang on White House posts that can send the market tumbling or soaring back up again. The company’s stock, though, is much less in vogue.

title: ServiceNow Falls After Reporting Sales Slowed by Mideast War
title_cn: ServiceNow 报告销售额因中东战争而放缓
summary: ServiceNow Inc. shares dropped in extended trading after the provider of software for business tasks reported results that disappointed investors and said some sales deals have been delayed by the war in the Middle East.

title: Texas Instruments Soars After Data Center Demand Buoys Sales
title_cn: 数据中心需求推动销售，德州仪器 (TI) 股价飙升
summary: Texas Instruments Inc. shares surged in late trading after the chipmaker gave a surprisingly strong forecast, helped by booming spending on data centers and industrial equipment.

title: Core Scientific Raises $3.3 Billion From AI Junk-Bond Offering
title_cn: Core Scientific 通过 AI 垃圾债券发行筹集 33 亿美元
summary: Core Scientific Inc. sold $3.3 billion in a high-yield note sale, marking the latest risky borrowing tied to AI infrastructure construction.

title: InfraCap's Hatfield Stands by 8,000 S&P 500 Price Target, US Exceptionalism
title_cn: InfraCap 的 Hatfield 维持 8,000 点标准普尔 500 指数价格目标，美国例外主义
summary: Jay Hatfield, Infrastructure Capital Advisors CEO and CIO, joins Bloomberg Businessweek Daily to discuss his markets and macro outlook, including his year-end S&P 500 price target of 8,000 which he continues to stand by as markets hit new highs amid the Iran war. Hatfield also adds that even amid broader geopolitical tensions and higher energy prices, "The notion that the US has lost its exceptionalism is ridiculous." On Wednesday, stocks climbed to all-time highs as a slew of strong corporate results and President Donald Trump’s extension of a ceasefire with Iran revived risk appetites after a two-day retreat. Bitcoin rallied. The S&P 500’s 1% gain extended its advance for the month, set to be the best since 2020. Chipmakers climbed for a 16th straight day, the longest-ever winning streak. Hatfield speaks with Carol Massar and Tim Stenovec. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Tesla Benefiting From Soaring Oil Prices, Ross Gerber Says
title_cn: 罗斯·格伯表示，特斯拉受益于油价飙升
summary: Ross Gerber, co-founder and CEO of Gerber Kawasaki Wealth and Investment Management, says consumers have to be "crazy" to not want to drive an electric vehicle as oil prices surge while reacting to Tesla's latest earnings report on "Bloomberg The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Tim Cook Regrets Maps Flub, Sees Apple Watch as His Proudest Work
title_cn: 蒂姆·库克对地图失误感到遗憾，认为 Apple Watch 是他最值得骄傲的作品
summary: Apple Inc. Chief Executive Officer Tim Cook, who plans to step down in a few months, cited the launch of Apple Maps on the iPhone in 2012 as his “first really big mistake” as the company’s boss.

title: Alex Cooper, Husband Skip Team Meeting After Behavior Complaints
title_cn: 亚历克斯·库珀 (Alex Cooper) 的丈夫因行为投诉而缺席团队会议
summary: Unwell, the media company founded by podcaster Alex Cooper and her husband, Matt Kaplan, held an all-hands meeting on Tuesday, amid concerns about the startup’s show launches, employee retention and complaints about Kaplan’s behavior.

title: AI Has Emboldened Child Predators, and Investigators Can't Keep Up
title_cn: 人工智能让儿童掠夺者变得更加大胆，调查人员无法跟上
summary: To find real kids in danger, law enforcement must sift through a surge of AI-generated sex imagery.

title: Property Billionaire Warns of Data Center Selloff as Debt Swells
title_cn: 房地产亿万富翁警告称，随着债务膨胀，数据中心将遭到抛售
summary: A global wave of mergers and acquisitions is looming among private equity-backed data-center companies as their debt burdens become unmanageable, said Greg Goodman, chief executive officer of Australian industrial property giant Goodman Group.

title: AI Is the Big Issue Facing IBM, Jefferies' Thill Says
title_cn: Jefferies 的 Thill 表示，人工智能是 IBM 面临的大问题
summary: Brent Thill, Jefferies software and Internet research tech sector leader, reacts to IBM posting quarterly sales in its software unit that were in line with estimates, failing to shake investor concerns about AI disruption to its business. He speaks on "Bloomberg The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Centerview’s Tony Kim Says AI Changes Pace, Structure of Deals
title_cn: Centerview 的 Tony Kim 表示人工智能改变了交易的节奏和结构
summary: Rich Mullen, partner at Wilson Sonsini Goodrich, and Tony Kim, co-president of investment banking at Centerview Partners, joins Dani Burger and Ryan Gould on "Bloomberg Deals." The pace of advances in artificial intelligence is changing the structure of how deals are getting done in the space, according to Tony Kim, Centerview Partners’ co-president of investment banking.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Tesla Faces Tricky Road Ahead, Former Board Member Says
title_cn: 前董事会成员表示，特斯拉面临着棘手的道路
summary: The Westly Group founder Steve Westly, a former Tesla board member, reacts to Tesla's first-quarter earnings that beat Wall Street’s estimates on "Bloomberg The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: IBM Posts Software Sales That Fail to Shake AI Concerns
title_cn: IBM 公布的软件销售业绩未能消除对人工智能的担忧
summary: International Business Machines Corp. posted quarterly sales in its software unit that were in line with estimates, failing to shake investor concerns about AI disruption to its business.

title: Google Cloud Debuts New AI Chips | Bloomberg Tech 4/22/2026
title_cn: 谷歌云推出新的人工智能芯片彭博科技 2026 年 4 月 22 日
summary: Bloomberg’s Caroline Hyde and Ed Ludlow discuss Google Cloud's latest generation of tensor processing units, or TPU, and the Alphabet division’s new partnerships. Plus, a small group of unauthorized users has accessed Anthropic's new AI model, Mythos, according to a source and documents reviewed by Bloomberg. And, Rivian CEO RJ Scaringe joins as his company’s new R2 model, its smaller, cheaper SUV, begins rolling off the manufacturing floor in Normal, Illinois. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Musk's $60 Billion Bet on Cursor Comes as xAI Falls Behind on Coding
title_cn: xAI 在编码方面落后，马斯克斥资 600 亿美元押注 Cursor
summary: Elon Musk’s artificial intelligence startup xAI has spent months trying to convince businesses to use its Grok chatbot for speeding up the process of coding. But Musk’s own employees have sometimes been reluctant to do the same.

title: TSMC Says ASML’s Latest Chipmaking Gear Is Too Pricey to Use
title_cn: 台积电表示 ASML 最新的芯片制造设备太贵而无法使用
summary: Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Co. will hold off on deploying ASML Holding NV’s most cutting-edge lithography machines for chip production through 2029 to save money, dealing a potential setback to the Dutch maker of the costly equipment.

title: US Air Force Selects Three Microreactor Companies to Power Bases
title_cn: 美国空军选择三个微反应器公司为基地供电
summary: The US Department of the Air Force selected three companies to install nuclear microreactors to power military sites, a sign of growing interest in fission systems as electricity demand climbs.

title: Global Telecom Mega-Merger, Bailout Caused By Financial Stress | Bloomberg Deals 4/22/2026
title_cn: 全球电信大并购、财务压力引发救助|彭博社优惠 2026 年 4 月 22 日
summary: A weekly, midday program that delivers high-impact, editorially driven coverage of the most important corporate transactions shaping the global market. Today's guests: Diameter Capital Managing Partner Co-Founder Jonathan Lewinsohn, USA Rare Earth CEO Barbara Humpton, Centerview Partners Co-President of Investment Banking Tony Kim, Wilson Sonsini Partner Head of M&A Rich Mullen, and Goldman Sachs Global Head of Activism & Takeover Defense Avinash Mehrotra.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Telsa Shares Drop on Plans to Double Capital Spending This Year
title_cn: 特斯拉股价因今年资本支出翻倍计划而下跌
summary: A Tesla dealership in Tokyo, Japan.

title: Vast Data Reaches $30 Billion Value, Preps for IPO
title_cn: 海量数据价值达 300 亿美元，为 IPO 做准备
summary: Software maker Vast Data has raised a $1 billion Series F, tripling its valuation to $30 billion. Vast Data CEO Renen Hallak says the company is readying itself for an IPO. Hallak joins Caroline Hyde and Ed Ludlow on “Bloomberg Tech.” (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Centerview’s Tony Kim Says AI Changes Pace, Structure of Deals
title_cn: Centerview 的 Tony Kim 表示人工智能改变了交易的节奏和结构
summary: The pace of advances in artificial intelligence is changing the structure of how deals are getting done in the space, according to Tony Kim, Centerview Partners’ co-president of investment banking.

title: Tesla Shares Need New ‘Razzle-Dazzle’ as EVs Slow, AI Hype Cools
title_cn: 随着电动汽车发展缓慢、人工智能炒作降温，特斯拉股价需要新的“炫目”
summary: Wall Street analysts expect Tesla Inc. to deliver a big jump in earnings when it reports Wednesday, something investors would have clamored for in the past.

title: UK Banks ‘Prepared’ for Mythos Risk, Industry Group Says
title_cn: 行业组织表示，英国银行已为神话风险“做好准备”
summary: Major UK financial institutions including the Bank of England have concluded they are “prepared” for emerging cybersecurity risk stemming from developments in artificial intelligence, after holding a meeting to discuss the impact of Anthropic PBC’s Mythos model.

title: USA Rare Earth CEO Says US is in ‘Early Innings’ of Independence
title_cn: 美国稀土首席执行官表示美国正处于独立的“早期阶段”
summary: USA Rare Earth Inc.’s $2.8 billion acquisition of Brazil’s Serra Verde Group is a step toward US independence from China for rare earth metals, said Chief Executive Officer Barbara Humpton.

title: EssilorLuxottica Posts 11% Sales Gain on AI-Glasses Growth
title_cn: EssilorLuxottica 因 AI 眼镜增长而销售额增长 11%
summary: EssilorLuxottica SA reported an 11% rise in first-quarter sales on a constant-currency basis, extending a growth increase driven by its AI-glasses partnership with Meta Platforms Inc.

title: US Could Own Up to 90% of Spirit in $500 Million Rescue Plan
title_cn: 5亿美元救助计划中，美国可能拥有烈酒高达90%的股份
summary: The Trump administration is nearing a rescue package for Spirit Airlines that could give the US government the option to own as much as 90% of the carrier once it emerges from bankruptcy, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Sen. Marshall: US Should ‘Finish the Job’ in Iran
title_cn: 参议员马歇尔：美国应该“完成”在伊朗的工作
summary: Senator Roger Marshall (R-KS), a member of the Senate Agriculture and Budget Committees, defends staying the course in the Iran war, saying the US must “finish the job” to prevent a nuclear-armed Iran even as Strait of Hormuz disruptions push up fuel costs and strain farmers. He also says Congress must pass a reconciliation bill “sooner than later” to keep DHS funded, signaling a vote-a-rama could begin as soon as Wednesday night, and warns he would be “disappointed” by cannabis rescheduling. He speaks with Kailey Leinz and Joe Mathieu on the late edition of Bloomberg’s "Balance of Power." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Mexico Considering Bank Head Lazzeri as Top Diplomat in the US
title_cn: 墨西哥考虑将银行行长拉泽里任命为驻美国最高外交官
summary: President Claudia Sheinbaum is considering the head of two local development banks as a candidate for ambassador to the US, a move that would mark the second major personnel shift at the Foreign Ministry ahead of key trade talks, according to people with knowledge of the matter.

title: Sen. Smith: War Creating Massive Economic Uncertainty
title_cn: 史密斯参议员：战争造成巨大的经济不确定性
summary: Senator Tina Smith (D-MN) discusses how the conflict in the Middle East is creating "massive economic uncertainty" for her constituents and specifically details how farmers are significantly feeling the impact. She criticizes the Trump Administration's military strategy and the ongoing debates around DHS funding and ICE reforms. Senator Smith speaks with Kailey Leinz and Joe Mathieu on the late edition of Bloomberg's "Balance of Power." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Navy Chief Steps Down in Latest Pentagon Wartime Departure
title_cn: 海军参谋长在五角大楼最近一次战时离任中辞职
summary: Navy Secretary John Phelan is stepping down “effective immediately,” the Defense Department said, the latest high-profile Pentagon departure amid the war in Iran.

title: Peru Agrees to Proceed With F-16 Contract Following US Pressure
title_cn: 秘鲁在美国压力下同意继续签订 F-16 合同
summary: The Peruvian government said it would move forward with a contract to purchase new fighter jets, reversing course after the resignation of two key cabinet members and under heavy pressure from the US.

title: UK Links France’s Border Plan Funding to Performance in New Deal
title_cn: 英国将法国边境计划资金与新政表现联系起来
summary: The UK and France have agreed a new £660 million ($891 million) deal aimed at reducing the flow of migrants crossing the English Channel, making British funding conditional on results for the first time.

title: Iran Fires on Hormuz Ships as US Navy Intercepts Oil Tankers
title_cn: 美国海军拦截油轮，伊朗向霍尔木兹船只开火
summary: Iranian gunboats fired on commercial ships in the Strait of Hormuz while the US intercepted two of the Islamic Republic’s oil tankers.

title: Palm Beach Billionaires Feud Over Who’s Really Protecting the Everglades
title_cn: 棕榈滩亿万富翁争论谁真正保护大沼泽地
summary: A plan by the influential Fanjul brothers to convert sugarcane fields in the Florida wetlands into a rock mine has angered fellow elites.

title: Chile’s Key Bill Set to Widen Deficit Regardless of Growth
title_cn: 无论经济增长如何，智利的关键法案都将扩大赤字
summary: Chile’s new government sent its flagship economic bill to congress Wednesday, with the budget office forecasting it would erode public finances throughout the administration’s four years in office.

title: CIA Deaths in Mexico Rekindle Security Tensions With US
title_cn: 中央情报局在墨西哥死亡事件重新引发与美国的安全紧张关系
summary: The death of US officials following an operation to dismantle a drug lab in northern Mexico is escalating tensions with Washington, as President Claudia Sheinbaum insists her government was unaware of their involvement.

title: RFK Jr. Downplays Benefits of Vaccines in Testy Senate Hearing
title_cn: 小罗伯特·肯尼迪在激烈的参议院听证会上淡化了疫苗的好处
summary: US Health and Human Services Secretary Robert F. Kennedy Jr. was challenged by Republican Senator Bill Cassidy in a congressional hearing after incorrectly claiming that a study showed vaccines didn’t help slash the US mortality rate last century.

title: One Big Midterm Risk for Trump, GOP: Democrats With Subpoena Power
title_cn: 特朗普和共和党面临的一大中期风险：民主党拥有传票权
summary: White House likely would face investigations if House flips

title: How Redistricting Is Reshaping US Political Battles
title_cn: 选区重新划分如何重塑美国政治斗争
summary: Voters’ approval of a map redrawing Virginia’s congressional district boundaries in Democrats’ favor marked one of the most significant developments in a yearlong nationwide battle that could determine which party controls the US House of Representatives.

title: Stocks Near Record Highs on Iran Truce Extension | Bloomberg Businessweek Daily 4/22/2026
title_cn: 伊朗停战协议延期，股市接近历史新高彭博商业周刊日报 2026 年 4 月 22 日
summary: On today's episode of Bloomberg Businessweek Daily, Carol Massar and Tim Stenovec discuss stocks sitting near record highs as President Trump extends the Iran ceasefire. Ray Takeyh, Senior Fellow for Middle East Studies at the Council on Foreign Relations, joins to discuss the US and Iran's "new normal" amid the indefinite ceasefire. Then, Bloomberg AI Editor Seth Fiegerman joins to discuss SpaceX saying it has an agreement to acquire AI startup Cursor. Then, Infrastructure Capital Advisors CEO and CIO Jay Hatfield joins to discuss his 2026 market outlook, and why he stands behind his year-end 8,000 S&P 500 price target. Finally, Suburban Propane CEO Michael Stivala on the company's 30th year as a publicly traded company, and customer demand for domestic propane. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US, Iran in Battle to Control Strait of Hormuz
title_cn: 美国与伊朗争夺霍尔木兹海峡控制权
summary: The US and Iran are locked in a battle for control of the Strait of Hormuz after failing to meet for a fresh round of peace talks even as President Donald Trump says he'll keep a ceasefire in place. Michael Ratney, the former US ambassador to Saudi Arabia, shares his perspective on "Bloomberg The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: GOP Senator Blocking Warsh Makes His Stand on Market Stability
title_cn: 共和党参议员阻止沃什表明其对市场稳定的立场
summary: The one man blocking Donald Trump from installing Kevin Warsh as his new Federal Reserve chair has drawn a red line: the stability of the US financial markets.

title: US Says No Firm Deadline for Iran Proposal Amid Hormuz Standoff
title_cn: 美国表示，在霍尔木兹海峡僵局中，伊朗提议没有明确的最后期限
summary: The US and Iran are locked in a battle for control of the Strait of Hormuz after failing to meet for a fresh round of peace talks, with both sides blocking the waterway to gain leverage during an extended ceasefire.

title: Trump Extends Ceasefire, Virginia Backs Redistricting| Balance of Power: Early Edition 4/22/2026
title_cn: 特朗普延长停火，弗吉尼亚支持重新划分选区|权力平衡：早期版本 2026 年 4 月 22 日
summary: On the early edition of Balance of Power,  Bloomberg Washington Correspondents Joe Mathieu and Kailey Leinz discuss the extension of the ceasefire between the US and Iran, a win for Democrats as Virginia voters back their redistricting plan, and reporting that the White House may move to reclassify marijuana. On today's show Bloomberg Intelligence Senior Defense Research Analyst Wayne Sanders, Bloomberg Intelligence Senior Government Analyst Nathan Dean,  Harvard Kennedy School Ash Center Visiting Democracy Fellow Jeanne Sheehan Zaino, Partner at Stonecourt Capital Rick Davis, and Democrat Congressman from Rhode Island Seth Magaziner. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US Trade Czar Threatens Canada Over Boycott That’s Hurting Booze Makers
title_cn: 美国贸易沙皇威胁加拿大抵制损害酒类制造商
summary: US Trade Representative Jamieson Greer said the US might have to take action against Canada over its rejection of American wine and spirits.

title: Key Peru Ministers Resign Over President’s Handling of F-16 Deal
title_cn: 秘鲁主要部长因总统处理 F-16 交易而辞职
summary: Peru’s defense and foreign affairs ministers resigned, alleging interim President Jose Maria Balcázar misled the nation about a fighter-jet deal they say was signed despite his denials.

title: US Expected to Ease Restrictions on Marijuana
title_cn: 美国有望放松对大麻的限制
summary: The US Justice Department is expected to reclassify marijuana into a less restrictive federal category as soon as Wednesday, according to a person familiar with the matter. The change could remove taxes for companies that sell marijuana. Shares of cannabis stocks rose on the news. Nathan Dean of Bloomberg Intelligence has more. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US Demands Concessions Before Formal Trade Talks with Canada, Charest Says
title_cn: 查斯特表示，美国在与加拿大进行正式贸易谈判之前要求做出让步
summary: The Trump administration is demanding concessions from Canada before it will begin serious negotiations on the US-Mexico-Canada Agreement, says a member of Prime Minister Mark Carney’s advisory committee on US trade relations.

title: Virginia Voters Approve Democratic Plan to Redraw Districts
title_cn: 弗吉尼亚州选民批准民主党重划选区的计划
summary: Virginia voters backed a Democratic plan to redraw the state’s congressional districts in a way that could net them as many as four more US House seats in November’s midterm elections, according to multiple projections.

title: Houston Drops Anti-ICE Rule to Salvage World Cup Security Funds
title_cn: 休斯顿放弃反 ICE 规则以挽救世界杯安全资金
summary: Houston city leaders abandoned plans to halt cooperation with federal immigration authorities after the Texas state government threatened to withhold $114 million in funds targeted mostly for security at FIFA World Cup matches.

title: Germany and India on Track to Seal Submarine Deal, Minister Says
title_cn: 部长表示，德国和印度有望签署潜艇协议
summary: Germany and India are set to finalize their $8 billion submarine deal within the next three months, according to German Defense Minister Boris Pistorius.

title: Neither Party Benefits from Redistricting Fight, Says Strategist Alex Conant
title_cn: 策略师亚历克斯·科南特表示，双方都不会从重新划分选区的斗争中受益
summary:
Alex Conant, Partner at Firehouse Strategies and Republican Strategist says that as states finalize new Congressional districts neither party seems to be getting an advantage nationally. 

Virginia voters backed a Democratic plan to redraw the state’s congressional districts in a way that could net them as many as four more US House seats in November’s midterm elections, according to multiple projections. 
With about 99% of the ballots in Tuesday’s referendum counted, the “Yes” vote led the “No” side by 51.5% to 48.6%.  The vote marked one of the final acts in a yearlong national battle sparked when Republicans moved to change voting boundaries in Texas, in an effort to keep GOP control of the US House in the midterms. It also served as an early test for Democratic Governor Abigail Spanberger, who supported the referendum as a response to Republican moves in other states.   (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Niger Weighs Military Conscription to Combat Islamist Militants
title_cn: 尼日尔考虑征兵打击伊斯兰武装分子
summary: Niger is considering introducing military conscription as part of domestic efforts to combat Islamist militants who pose a threat to stability in the West African country, a security official said.
